name: Greek Vegetable Pitas

ingredients.item: A quarter cup of crumbled feta cheese

method: Add the olive oil into the pan.
Add the onion and salt into the pan.
Cook the onions well and then add the black pepper into the pan.
Add the mixed vegetables into the mixture.
Add the chopped basil into the mixture.
Cook the ingredients well for about fifteen minutes.
Dish out when the vegetables are done.
Let the meat cool down, and then add the crumbled feta cheese into it.
Cut a hole into the bread and add the cooked mixture into it.
Garnish the bread with chopped cilantro.
Your dish is ready to be served.
